name: Untamed
profile_about:
The self-proclaimed ghost of artists passed.

I'm a lifelong Doom player and witty commenter.

I'm a little rusty on my Pokemon names.

If I put the unknown_artist tag on a piece that has a signature, it means I couldn't read or make sense of it (since that's how most signatures are these days)

When I'm not posting ancient art of questionable quality (at least by today's standards), I'm trying my best at artist identification, over on the unknown_artist tag, using SauceNAO (which sometimes isn't perfect, and therefore, neither am I xP).

I hope to somehow gain privileged/contributor status.. for no other reason than I guess it's something cool to be.

I very much like getting comments on my posts, they're a good read, most of the time. As much as it's against the rules, I admit that I enjoy reading creepy comments.
Please don't take this as encouragement to leave creepy comments though.. I'd rather not take responsibility for ones made as a result of people reading this.

I occasionally put descriptions on what I upload, this is usually the artist's words, not mine.

If I have uploaded some of your art, and it has received rude comments, please don't hold me responsible.

In closing, I absolutely love this website, I'm thankful to the staff for keeping it well maintained, and most importantly, I enjoy contributing to e621.
